text: The best story yet is her own. Call Her Alex, the two-part documentary series, premieres June 10 on Hulu and with #HuluOnDisneyPlus.

Fast Company recognizes the most innovative companies, so to not only represent women in business but also have Unwell recognized in this category is an incredible honor. In Hollywood and media, we’re often only privy to the flashy announcements and exciting projects. Beyond the screen are the countless hours of pre- and post-production, the execution of live events, and the scaling of consumer products. From navigating podcast acquisition models to launching an in-house agency, it takes a village of incredibly talented individuals to keep a company like Unwell running at full capacity. Now, at about 100 people, I’m so proud to see this company grow bigger than me. Our executives, leaders, and teams have all been integral to taking this startup and building it into what it is today. Thank you to @fastcompany for recognizing how Unwell has worked to trailblaze in a space that continues to grow and evolve.  It’s a very exciting time, and I look forward to all the challenges, wins, and lessons we will continue to experience as this next era of Unwell is unleashed.
